description: A citizen reports graffiti on a public building. An operator dispatches a cleaning crew.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge a 'graffiti' service request from the 311 system, including a photo of the graffiti.
Identify the asset (e.g., 'Community Center Wall') and create a 'Graffiti Removal' work order.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates the appropriate work order type.

nodes.task_description: Assign the work order to the city's mobile cleaning crew.
